responses: Hey there! 👋 I'm Aaryan's AI assistant. I'm here to answer any questions about his project management work, software delivery, or Health-Tech products. What would you like to explore today?
Hello! 😊 I'm Aaryan Gupta's virtual assistant. I can tell you about his background, services, experience, and the software systems he builds for clinics and businesses. What can I do for you?
Hi! Welcome. I know everything about Aaryan's portfolio, including projects like ProjectPort, UiBrium, and his practice management tools. What's on your mind? 🚀
Hey! Glad you stopped by. 👋 I can guide you through Aaryan's case studies, tech stack, and freelance services, or answer clinical software questions. What are you looking for?

Aaryan Gupta is a Technical Project Manager (TPM) based in Jaipur, India. He specializes in health-tech digital transformation, SaaS project coordination, AI automation, and building micro-SaaS software for clinics and SMBs. He graduated with an MCA from AKTU (2025, CGPA 7.31) and transitioned from frontend development to PM because he realized coordination is where tech projects succeed or fail. Would you like to know more about his professional experience or his tech stack?

He's a dev-turned-PM who bridges complex technology and business execution. Based out of Jaipur, with markets in Ahmedabad, Noida, and globally, Aaryan has successfully delivered 20+ projects across healthcare, e-commerce, and SaaS. He currently works as an Associate Project Manager at Oblinex, coordinating products for 70+ international markets! Should I share his education or key project details?

Aaryan is a technical PM with a developer background. He excels at managing Agile teams, planning sprints, and provisioning servers. He is highly passionate about improving digital health in India by building one-time purchase, self-hosted software for clinics (like TokenQ and RxPad). What aspect of his background can I clarify?

Aaryan is highly fluent in both project management and software engineering. Here is his stack:

🔹 **Project Management:** Agile, Scrum, Kanban, Jira, Notion, Trello, Miro, Sprint Governance, Risk Management, QA Validation.
🔹 **Frontend:** React.js, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.
🔹 **Backend & Database:** Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, MySQL, Firebase, REST APIs.
🔹 **AI & Automation:** Prompt Engineering, OpenAI/Claude APIs, Botpress, n8n, Make/Zapier, WhatsApp Business Automation.
🔹 **DevOps & Cloud:** Git, GitHub, Vercel, Linux (Debian/Ubuntu Server Administration), VPS Provisioning, SSL setup.

Would you like to hear about the projects he built using these skills?

He spans frontend code (React, Tailwind), backend structures (Node, MongoDB), DevOps deployment (Linux, Vercel, VPS, domains), and AI automation (n8n, Botpress). This means he speaks the developer's language, allowing him to estimate tasks and lead engineering sprints with 40% less planning overhead. Want to know more about his Agile process?

With a blend of MERN development and Agile PM disciplines, Aaryan can read code, test API endpoints, provision VPS servers, write SQL/NoSQL queries, and manage Scrum tickets in Jira. He doesn't just manage schedules — he manages product architecture. What tech or tool are you interested in?

Aaryan has 3+ years of professional experience in IT delivery. Here's a breakdown of his roles:

1. **Associate Project Manager | Oblinex Pvt. Ltd. (May 2025 — Present):** Managing end-to-end delivery for concurrent live accounts across 70+ international markets (US, UK, UAE, Europe, etc.). Coordinates sprints, conducts pre-release QA, and provisions VPS servers (Ubuntu, SSL, domain routing).
2. **Frontend Web3 Developer Intern | MyDigiShell (Apr 2025 — Feb 2026):** Managed Web3 client dashboard integrations and wallet integrations over 11 months using React and Tailwind.
3. **Digital Marketer & E-Commerce Strategist | Elipact Enterprises (Nov 2021 — Mar 2022):** Led SEO content plans and landing page builds for Shopify/WordPress.
4. **Web Developer & WordPress Specialist | Startup Web Support (Aug 2021 — Nov 2021):** Delivered optimized, responsive websites brief-to-launch.

Would you like to see his educational credentials or project case studies?

Over the last 3 years, Aaryan has delivered 20+ technology projects and overseen client operations in 70+ international markets. He currently handles account onboarding, sprint planning, ticket tracking, and app store updates at Oblinex, Patna. Would you like me to highlight his health-tech portfolio or his certifications?

Aaryan's academic qualifications include:

🎓 **Master of Computer Applications (MCA):** Lloyd Institute of Engineering & Technology, Greater Noida (affiliated with AKTU University), 2023–2025 | CGPA: 7.31.

🏆 **IBM / IBMMooc:** Virtual Internship in Web & Mobile Development (MERN Stack, 2026)

These support his technical foundations. Ready to see some of his built products?

He has built several high-impact products, including:

🚀 **ProjectPort:** A full-stack client project automation platform (React, Node, MongoDB) that accelerates client onboarding by 40%.
🚀 **UiBrium:** An open-source React UI dashboard component library published on NPM with over 2,000 downloads, focusing on dark-mode dashboards and 100% accessibility.
🚀 **Aryanony AI Bot:** An automated lead qualification and support bot that reduces client ticket loads by 60%.
🚀 **Micro-SaaS Clinic Apps:** Patient queue (TokenQ) and prescription pad systems deployed locally for doctors.

Which of these would you like to dive into?

Aaryan has delivered multiple custom products, including ProjectPort (SaaS client dashboard), UiBrium (React components on NPM), and several clinic queue/prescription generators. I can provide detailed features, price points, and links for any of them! Which one should we check?

**ProjectPort** is Aaryan's full-stack client project automation platform. It features automated invoice generation, contract signing, client dashboard widgets, and Slack webhooks to notify team channels of new onboarding events. It is built with React.js, Node.js, and MongoDB, and is live at **projectsport.vercel.app**!

**UiBrium** is Aaryan's open-source React UI dashboard component library published on NPM. It is designed specifically for dark-mode dashboard developers, providing highly clean, angular layouts, satoshi typography, and 100% accessibility compliance. It has crossed 2,000 downloads on NPM! Check it out at **uibrium.vercel.app**.

You're chatting with a version of the **Aryanony AI Assistant** right now! 😊 In production, this assistant integrates with platforms like Botpress and LLM APIs to handle client inquiries, qualify freelance leads, and schedule Calendly calls automatically, helping teams cut support ticket volumes by 60%.

Aaryan offers various services and products:

💼 **Technical Project Management / Retainers:** Sprint planning, Agile governance, QA release oversight (₹25k–₹60k/month or ₹25k–₹80k/project).
🏥 **Health-Tech Consulting:** Practice workflow digitization for clinics and diagnostic labs.
🤖 **AI & Automation:** Custom WhatsApp auto-replies, n8n workflows, support bot integrations (₹8k–₹30k one-time).
💻 **Micro-SaaS Products:** Zero-subscription, self-hosted tools like TokenQ or RxPad Pro (₹5k–₹35k one-time).
🛠️ **Website Maintenance:** Retainers starting at ₹2,000/month.

Would you like details on the pricing packages or the clinic products?

Here is Aaryan's transparent pricing schedule:

- **Agile PM / Team Coordination:** ₹25,000 – ₹60,000/month (Retainer).
- **Project PM Delivery:** ₹25,000 – ₹80,000 depending on scope.
- **Self-Hosted Micro-SaaS:** ₹5,000 – ₹35,000 one-time setup (Zero monthly software fees).
- **AI Workflow Automations (n8n/Make):** ₹8,000 – ₹30,000 one-time.
- **Website Maintenance retaining contracts:**
  - *Essential:* ₹2,000/month (security checks + minor updates)
  - *Professional:* ₹4,000/month (performance optimization + 10 hrs support)
  - *Premium:* ₹8,000/month (priority emergency support + unlimited minor updates)

All services begin with a free 30-minute scoping call (calendly.com/aaryanpm/30min).

Health-Tech is Aaryan's primary specialization. He bridges the clinical workflow gap for Indian doctors. He knows that clinic software fails if it ignores reception-to-OPD timings, receptionist comfort levels, or internet dropouts. To fix this, he designs and deploys custom, self-hosted tools: **TokenQ** (WhatsApp queue system), **RxPad Pro** (digital prescriptions), **LabTrack Pro** (lab flows), **RecallMD** (automated follow-ups), and **CareReview** (ratings builder).

All tools are **one-time purchase**, self-hosted on the clinic's local machine or a VPS, with **no monthly subscription fees**! Are you a doctor or clinic owner in Jaipur, Ahmedabad, or elsewhere?

Most software developers build clinic apps with complex interfaces that doctors find too slow to use in a 3-minute checkup window. Aaryan custom-scopes clinical systems (EMR, patient queues, prescriptions) around the doctor's actual workflow, removing tech chaos and giving doctors back 2 hours per day. Want me to break down his specific clinic software products?

**TokenQ** is Aaryan's OPD Patient Queue System designed to eliminate crowded waiting rooms. Patients scan a QR code to receive token updates directly via WhatsApp. The doctor and receptionist see a real-time live queue screen. One-time setup: ₹6,000 – ₹12,000 (deployed in 24 hours). Zero monthly SaaS fees!

**RxPad Pro** is a Digital Prescription Pad. It allows doctors to type or voice-input prescription notes quickly. The system automatically structures diagnoses and dosages and generates a clean, branded PDF on the clinic's letterhead. It also stores complete patient history. One-time setup: ₹5,000 – ₹10,000 (deployed in 24 hours).

**LabTrack Pro** is a diagnostic laboratory workflow manager. It handles sample tracking from collection to testing, generates structured pathology/radiology reports, and sends PDF reports to patients automatically via WhatsApp. One-time setup: ₹15,000 – ₹35,000 (deployed in 48 hours).

**RecallMD** is a Patient Follow-Up Automation tool. It integrates with WhatsApp to send automated appointment reminders, post-treatment follow-up questions, and dosage schedules, requiring zero manual work from your staff. One-time setup: ₹4,000 – ₹8,000 (deployed in 12 hours).

**CareReview** is a Google Review Builder for clinics. It sends automated post-visit check-ins on WhatsApp, prompting happy patients to share their feedback on Google Maps, helping doctors grow their local digital footprint. One-time setup: ₹4,000 – ₹9,000 (deployed in 12 hours).

Aaryan's key differentiator for medical professionals is his **One-Time Purchase, Self-Hosted model**. Instead of paying ₹2,000–₹5,000 every single month to cloud software vendors (who hold your patient data hostage), Aaryan builds and installs the software directly on your clinic's own computer or a private VPS. You own your data forever, secure patient confidentiality, and pay ₹0 in monthly subscription fees. Want to discuss digitizing your clinic?

Aaryan is based in Jaipur, Rajasthan, and is active in the local healthcare and startup ecosystem! He works closely with medical clinics and healthcare practitioners across neighborhoods like Vaishali Nagar, Malviya Nagar, and JLN Marg, and is familiar with the digital needs of local clinics near SMS Hospital (Sawai Man Singh Hospital) and the RIICO industrial networks. Would you like to schedule a local in-person meeting in Jaipur to discuss your project?

Aaryan focuses on the Ahmedabad market, targeting Gujarat's growing health-tech corridor, GIFT City startups, and the pharmaceutical hubs along SG Highway. He understands the strict operational demands of diagnostic labs and clinics in areas like Satellite and Vastrapur. He can coordinate remotely or schedule visits to Ahmedabad for major deployment milestones. Want to talk about health-tech setup in Gujarat?

Self-hosting clinic or business software gives you three major benefits:

1. **Zero Recurring SaaS Fees:** You pay a single one-time setup fee instead of paying ₹2,000–₹5,000 every single month. Over 5 years, this saves ₹1.2 Lakh to ₹3 Lakhs.
2. **100% Data Security & Privacy:** Your patient records and prescription histories are stored on your own local PC or your private VPS. No third-party company can access, inspect, or hold your clinical data hostage.
3. **Tailored Workflow Speed:** Cloud-based software lags when your internet drops. A locally hosted instance runs at LAN speed (0.1ms latency), meaning reception desk check-ins and Doctor OPD prescription generation load instantly.

Traditional cloud SaaS services own your data, lock you into monthly payments, and go offline when the internet goes down. Deploying a self-hosted instance (via Aaryan's micro-SaaS framework) means you own the database, secure clinical confidentiality, and pay zero recurring subscriptions. Want to know how we deploy it?

Compared to platforms like Practo, Lybrate, or Docpulse, Aaryan's self-hosted tools represent a fundamentally different philosophy:

- **Zero Commissions / Monthly Fees:** Practo charges commission per booking or a high monthly subscription. Aaryan's tools are a one-time purchase.
- **Data Custody:** Platforms like Practo share/analyze your clinic's patient metrics for marketing. With Aaryan's custom self-hosted setup, the database is 100% yours, private, and secure.
- **OPD Speed:** Practo requires a continuous, high-speed internet connection. Aaryan's queue (TokenQ) and prescription (RxPad) tools run locally at the clinic, making them immune to internet drops.

The deployment process is simple and completely handled by Aaryan:

1. **Workflow Mapping (30-Min Call):** We understand your clinic's layout and diagnose how your queue and prescribing flows.
2. **Infrastructure Prep:** Aaryan provisions a clean VPS (like Ubuntu via Hostinger/DigitalOcean) or configures a local PC at your clinic.
3. **Installation & Coding:** Aaryan installs Node/Express, sets up MongoDB/MySQL, registers WhatsApp API templates, and configures secure SSL.
4. **OPD Simulation & Live Training:** We run test tokens and prescriptions to train your receptionist and check timings (12-48 hrs setup window).

Ready to discuss your clinic's setup?

Yes, Aaryan integrates official, compliant Meta WhatsApp Business APIs or secure local automation gateways to ensure your messages are 100% legal. The queue tokens (TokenQ) and prescriptions (RxPad Pro) are sent via approved messaging templates, meaning you avoid number blocking or spam flags. We configure template variables dynamically so messages feel personalized and clinic-branded.

Aaryan provides solid post-delivery safety nets:

- **30-Day Free Support:** Every custom setup includes 30 days of free troubleshooting.
- **Automated Backups:** We schedule daily, encrypted database backups to your Google Drive or AWS S3, ensuring zero data loss.
- **Website Maintenance retaining packages:** For ongoing safety, you can enroll in a maintenance retainer starting at ₹2,000/month for active monitoring, server updates, and emergency support.

Yes, absolutely! Since Aaryan's micro-SaaS applications are delivered as one-time setup products (not rigid cloud platforms), the source code is tailored directly to your clinic. We can add custom pathology tests to LabTrack Pro, customize prescription fields in RxPad Pro to match your exact clinic letterhead, or adapt booking forms to capture specific patient inputs.

patterns: what does he do at oblinex
responses: Oblinex Pvt. Ltd. is an international technology and software delivery organization. As an Associate Project Manager at Oblinex, Aaryan oversees infrastructure, database deployments, and developer teams serving clients across **70+ global markets**. This role has trained him in managing highly scalable databases, configuring bulletproof VPS hosting, and keeping remote teams aligned under strict delivery schedules.
